data.title: RAAP study warns states against copying Medicare Maximum Fair Price for drug pricing due to inefficiency.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Washington, the Rare Access Action Project (RAAP) issued a cautionary paper to policymakers about replicating Medicare's Maximum Fair Price (MFP) framework in addressing prescription drug affordability. States are seeking innovative approaches to tackle this issue. The paper highlights the potential risks involved and advises against blindly adopting MFP. It serves as a reminder to carefully consider the implications before implementing similar strategies. This initiative comes at a crucial time when prescription drug costs have become a significant concern for many, with the need for effective solutions being more pressing than ever.

data.title: Inventor creates DRY FLUSH toilet to save water when flushing urine. Reduces water usage, lowers costs.
data.description: In a recent innovation development on February 18, 2026, a creator from Lakewood, New Jersey, discussed the inspiration behind the design of a novel toilet system aimed at conserving water during urine flushing. The inventor highlighted the introduction of the DRY FLUSH as a solution to reduce water usage on a regular basis. This groundbreaking creation is designed to minimize water consumption, potentially leading to cost savings for users.

data.title: Starget Pharma secures $18M funding, partners with Center for Molecular Imaging, Louisiana, for radioligand development.
data.description: An investment is driving the progress of AI-based radioligand discovery and clinical development by Starget Pharma Inc in Shreveport, Louisiana. The company has expanded its U.S. operations and is contributing to the advancement of the state's life sciences innovation ecosystem. This investment marks a significant step in the company's growth and will further its research in the field. The move is set to create numerous job opportunities in the sector and boost economic development in the region. The investment is anticipated to reach millions of dollars and positions Starget Pharma Inc as a key player in the radiopharmaceutical industry.

data.title: Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) stock rises after strong quarter with Q4 earnings per share of $3.64 and $1.889 billion in sales (up 13%).
data.description: Moody’s Corporation (NYSE: MCO) saw an increase in shares following a strong quarter where the ratings and analytics firm experienced widespread growth across its business divisions. Investors were particularly impressed by the positive outlook provided by management regarding the demand for decision-support tools and credit-market services. In the fourth quarter, the company reported adjusted earnings per share of $3.64, surpassing the analyst consensus of $3.42. Quarterly sales reached $1.889 billion, marking a 13% increase compared to the previous year, exceeding the Street's expectation of $1.862 billion. Moody’s Analytics revenue also experienced growth, rising by 9%, mainly driven by a 12% increase in Decision Solutions and 6% in...

data.title: Long Island University announces 2025 George Polk Awards winners, 9 out of 15 focus on federal policies.
data.description: In the latest announcement by Long Island University on February 18, 2026, nine out of the 15 recipients of the 2025 George Polk Awards were recognized for their work in highlighting issues related to federal policies. These policies encompassed areas such as immigration, public health, foreign aid, and presidential authority. Alongside these winners, three more individuals were honored for their exceptional contributions in other fields.

data.title: Kyowa Hakko explains Setria® Glutathione's excellence with human research, brand trust. Setria® - a 20-year global standard.
data.description: Setria® Glutathione, a well-established standard for the past two decades globally, has gained attention due to human clinical studies demonstrating its effectiveness through oral consumption. This has led to increased recognition in the health and wellness industry. The brand's strong reputation has been a key factor in its continued selection. The development was highlighted in New York on Feb. 18, 2026.

data.title: Litigation partner secures Conditional Pardon for client Jerry James, releasing him from prison after 20+ years.
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia on February 18, 2026, Brendan D. O'Toole, a litigation partner at Williams Mullen, successfully obtained a Conditional Pardon for his pro bono client, Jerry L. James, leading to his freedom after serving over twenty years behind bars. Jerry James had been sentenced...

data.title: Mercy Medical Center named a top mid-size employer for 2026 by Forbes, 7th time receiving honor.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on February 18, 2026, Mercy Medical Center in Baltimore has achieved recognition as one of the top 500 midsize employers in the United States for 2026. With a staff size ranging from 1,000 to 5,000 employees, this accolade was bestowed by Forbes magazine, a prominent national business publication. Remarkably, this marks the seventh occasion that Mercy Medical Center has been granted this prestigious honor.

data.title: National Comedy Center in Jamestown, NY, named #1 Best Pop Culture Museum by USA Today 10Best.
data.description: In Jamestown, New York, the National Comedy Center achieved the top spot as the best pop culture museum in the United States, according to USA Today 10Best rankings. The center was ranked as the number one pop culture museum in the country.

data.title: FDA accepts Moderna's flu vaccine application for review, sets Aug. 5 deadline. Stock up, aims for approval for adults 50+.
data.description: Moderna Inc. (NASDAQ: MRNA) has seen a rise in its share price due to positive developments with its investigational flu vaccine, mRNA-1010. The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has agreed to review Moderna's biologics license application for mRNA-1010 with a PDUFA goal date of August 5. The vaccine is targeted towards adults aged 50 and older. Moderna aims for full approval for adults between 50 to 64 years old and accelerated approval for adults 65 and older. Pending FDA approval, mRNA-1010 could be available for U.S. adults aged 50 and older, including those 65 and older, by the 2026/2027 flu season. This marks a significant step for Moderna as the vaccine continues to progress through regulatory pathways.

data.title: Dow Jones up 300 points with bullish breadth, Nvidia stock rises on Meta deal. Amer Sports excels in breakout.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise, increasing by 300 points amidst a broad expansion in the market. Nvidia stock surged following its recent agreement with Meta. Additionally, Amer Sports showcased a strong performance, glowing in a breakout scenario. This positive market trend was highlighted in live coverage, demonstrating a bullish momentum in the stock market.

data.title: NVIDIA's Run:AI tech boosts GPU throughput by 77% with only half allocation, reaching 86% user capacity. Allows 3x more users for AI tasks.
data.description: According to recent benchmarks conducted by NVIDIA and Nebius, it has been demonstrated that GPU fractioning can effectively achieve 86% of user capacity with only 0.5 GPU allocation. This breakthrough enables a significant increase in the number of concurrent users for mixed AI workloads, showing a threefold improvement in efficiency.

data.title: Boeing, Northrop Grumman resolve regulatory hurdles, poised for stock movement on government approvals.
data.description: Two major aerospace companies, Boeing and Northrop Grumman, successfully resolved two regulatory challenges that had put their recent projects in jeopardy. This positive development has significant implications for their stock performance as they are now poised to advance following key government approvals.

data.title: Fluor stock's RS rating increased from 63 to 80 due to its improving price performance.
data.description: The stock price of Fluor has demonstrated a notable increase, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 63 to 80. This upgrade signifies a significant improvement in the company's relative price performance.

data.title: ServisFirst Bancshares stock gets upgraded due to rising price performance, now with higher Relative Strength Rating.
data.description: ServisFirst Bancshares has seen an increase in its stock price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The company's stock has shown strong growth, earning a higher rating from Investors Business Daily. This upgrade indicates a positive trend in the company's performance, reflecting potential for investors.
Fed's Bowman: I still expect to propose new Basel bank capital rules by the end of the first quarter.

data.title: Sherwin-Williams declares dividend of $0.80/share. Payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 2, 2026.
data.description: The Sherwin-Williams Company's Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share, with payment scheduled for March 13, 2026, to shareholders on record as of March 2, 2026. This marks the 48th consecutive increase in dividends for the company.

data.title: Rollick unveils new AI Assistant to enhance customer engagement in outdoor recreation industry.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on February 18th, 2026, Rollick, Inc. unveiled the Rollick AI Assistant, a new tool aimed at enhancing engagement for outdoor recreation industry OEMs. Rollick is known for its digital retailing and customer engagement solutions. This innovative AI Assistant is expected to boost shopper interaction significantly, catering specifically to the needs of OEMs.

data.title: California home sales drop to lowest since May 2025 with 10.8% decrease in January to 256,550; median price at $823,180 - C.A.R.
data.description: In January, the number of existing, single-family home sales was 256,550 on a seasonally adjusted annualized rate, showing a decrease of 10.8% from 287,570 in December and a slight 1.3% dip from January 2025 when the sales were 260,040. The median home price in January across the state was $823,180, declining by 3.2% from the previous month's price of $850,680.
